common.tagline: Stories in shards. Meaning in the hush between.

signup.title: Join Fraylit
signup.subtitle: Leave a mark in the archive.
signup.usernameHint: 3–20 characters, letters, numbers and underscores only.
signup.checkEmail: Check your inbox to confirm your email, then log in.
signup.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists. Try logging in.
signup.redirectNotAllowed: Sign-up redirect URL is not configured. Add this site to Supabase Redirect URLs.
signup.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
signup.emailDisabled: Email sign-up is disabled in Supabase. Enable it under Authentication → Providers → Email.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Your craft, into the world.
timeline.emptyCta: Be the first to write one.

post.likeCount: {count, plural, =0 {No likes} one {# like} other {# likes}}
post.commentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No comments} one {# comment} other {# comments}}
post.loginToComment: Log in to join the conversation.
post.deleteConfirm: Delete this post? This cannot be undone.

create.title: Write something
create.subtitle: Pick your threshold — entry, exit, or the turn.
create.openingClosingDesc: Every fragment holds a before — and an after.
create.loginRequired: You need to log in to write.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Who touched your words.
notifications.empty: Silence for now — your echoes will gather here.
notifications.commented: {name} left a note on your fragment

validation.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3–20 characters: letters, numbers and underscores only.

subscription.limitReachedBody: Free accounts can publish {count} posts every 24 hours. Upgrade to Gold for unlimited posts.
subscription.alreadySubscribed: You're already a Gold member. Thank you!
